title: memecylon ultramaficum
intro: Memecylon ultramaficum is a rare and endemic plant species found in the Western Ghats region of India, specifically in the ultramafic soils of the Western Ghats mountain range. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and antioxidant activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Memecylon ultramaficum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections.
